# gibol.co

> Bahasa-first multi-sport dashboards for Indonesian fans — NBA Playoffs 2026, Formula 1 2026, Liga Inggris 2025-26, FIFA World Cup 2026, and BRI Liga 1 Indonesia. "Gibol" is Indonesian slang for "gila bola" (sports-obsessed). One hub, live data, zero backend.

gibol.co is a real-time sports companion aggregating Polymarket prediction odds, ESPN scoreboard data, and play-by-play action into a single terminal-style dashboard. Content updates every 10–30 seconds during live games. All data is sourced from public APIs and displayed with attribution.

## Live dashboards

- [NBA Playoffs 2026](https://www.gibol.co/nba-playoff-2026): Live scores, play-by-play, win probability, shot chart, box score, injury report, championship odds, bracket, series standings, team player stats, clutch leaders, watchlist, Fangir IBL trading-card partner banner. 2025–26 postseason, Apr 17 – Jun 20 2026.
- [Formula 1 2026](https://www.gibol.co/formula-1-2026): Kalender 23 balapan F1 dengan jam WIB, klasemen pembalap + konstruktor live dari Jolpica-F1, halaman per-GP terindeks, halaman per-tim (11 konstruktor) + per-pembalap (22 driver), constructor picker ala team picker NBA, bilingual F1 news feed (Bahasa + English, native sources, no machine translation), shareable "Catatan Race" podium cards per GP. 2026 FIA F1 World Championship, Mar 8 – Dec 6 2026.

## Coming soon

- [Liga Inggris 2025-26](https://www.gibol.co/premier-league-2025-26): Klasemen, jadwal, hasil, top skorer Premier League musim 2025-26, Aug 2025 – May 2026.
- [FIFA World Cup 2026](https://www.gibol.co/fifa-world-cup-2026): Piala Dunia FIFA 2026 di USA, Canada, Mexico — grup, bracket knockout, jadwal, Jun 11 – Jul 19 2026.
- [BRI Liga 1 Indonesia 2026](https://www.gibol.co/liga-1-2026): Super League Indonesia — Persija, Persib, klasemen, jadwal, hasil.
- [IBL — Indonesia Basketball League](https://www.gibol.co/ibl): Musim 2026-27 akan menyusul.

## Key facts (Formula 1 2026)

- 23-round calendar, Mar 8 (Australian GP) – Dec 6 (Abu Dhabi GP) 2026
- All times on Gibol are converted to WIB (UTC+7)
- 11 constructors: Red Bull, Ferrari, Mercedes, McLaren, Aston Martin, Alpine, Williams, Racing Bulls, Haas, Audi (ex-Sauber), Cadillac (new for 2026)
- 22 drivers — each has a per-driver SEO page at `/formula-1-2026/driver/{slug}` with standings, points, wins, podiums
- Each GP has a per-race SEO page at `/formula-1-2026/race/{slug}` with JSON-LD SportsEvent schema
- Each constructor has a per-team SEO page at `/formula-1-2026/team/{slug}` with JSON-LD SportsTeam schema and driver line-up
- Data source: Jolpica-F1 (Ergast successor) via edge-cached proxy
- Sprint weekends in 2026: 6 rounds flagged as sprint format
- Bilingual news: /api/f1-news?lang=id|en aggregates native Bahasa (detikSport, detikOto, CNN Indonesia, Antara) and English (Autosport, Motorsport.com, BBC Sport) RSS feeds, refreshed every 15 min. Bahasa coverage is sparse outside race weekends; empty feed returns 200 with empty items array.
- "Catatan Race" share-card PNGs at /og/f1/2026-R{nn}-{slug}-{og,story,square}.png for every completed GP — Bahasa podium recap optimized for WhatsApp / Instagram / X

## Key facts (NBA Playoffs 2026)

- Round 1 tips: April 18, 2026
- Play-in finale: April 17, 2026 (ORL vs CHA 7:30 PM ET, PHX vs GSW 10:00 PM ET)
- Finals tip-off: June 3, 2026 on ABC (best-of-7)
- 2025–26 title favorite (per Polymarket): Oklahoma City Thunder (~44%)
- TV rights deal: $76B 11-year Disney/NBC/Amazon

## Features

- Live win probability chart (ESPN probabilities API, per-play)
- Play-by-play ticker with team-color scoring highlights
- Shot chart overlay on half-court SVG
- Quarter-by-quarter line score
- Clutch leaderboard (Q4 ≤ 5 min, margin ≤ 5 pts)
- Team picker with full theming (30 NBA teams)
- Player watchlist with live milestone alerts
- Head-to-head history per matchup
- Streak chips (W5/L3) per team
- Championship path visualization for your selected team
- Scoring run detection
- Yesterday recap with biggest-upset detection
- Injury report from ESPN
- Bahasa Indonesia and English language toggle
- Light and dark theme toggle
- Mobile responsive below 1280px

## Data sources

- Polymarket Gamma API (championship + MVP event markets)
- Polymarket CLOB WebSocket (live price ticks for top contenders)
- ESPN Scoreboard + Summary + Probabilities + Team Schedule + Injuries (all undocumented public endpoints)

## Brand

- Tagline: "Gila bola · live sports dashboards"
- Voice: Indonesian-native, casual, sports-fan-first
- Partners: Fangir.com (2026 IBL Trading Cards pre-order)

## Attribution

Created by Ade Sulistio Putra (Indonesia). Built with Claude. Open to partnerships with Indonesian sports media, broadcasters, and leagues.
